description: Maps Azure Monitor alert severity and metadata to ServiceNow Table API fields.

incidentFieldMapping.comments: Opened automatically by Azure Monitor via Logic App integration. Source: azure-monitor-itsm

resolutionFieldMapping.close_notes: Azure Monitor alert auto-resolved. Resolved at: @{triggerBody()?['data']?['essentials']?['resolvedDateTime']}

supportedTargetTables.description: ITSM Incident — default, recommended for most alert scenarios
Event Management Event — use when Azure Monitor feeds an event console
Change Request — use for planned maintenance or change-driven alerts
Problem Record — use for recurring or root-cause tracking scenarios
